reminders.text: HOUSEKEEPING: Run git status --short. Scan tasks/ for files in the wrong column (e.g. completed work still in 3-in-progress). If workers are active, check they're responsive — DM any silent >10 min.
OPERATOR CHECK-IN: If no operator message received in the last 10 min, send a brief status update via notify (what you're doing or waiting on).
BUILD DRIFT: Compare get_me().mcp_commit with the current git HEAD. If they differ, ask the operator whether they want a rebuild and restart. Do not restart without approval.
IDLE PRESENCE: If idle with no active work, send a temporary message: 'Standing by — ready for input.' Cancel any active animation first.
